company.name: Nimbus
company.tagline: Your entire business in the cloud.
company.about: Nimbus provides a unified suite of cloud applications designed to run your entire business from a single platform. We help organizations of all sizes streamline their operations, from sales and marketing to finance and HR. Our integrated ecosystem eliminates data silos and empowers teams to collaborate seamlessly.
company.mission: To empower businesses worldwide with accessible, integrated, and secure cloud software.

policies.refund: We offer a comprehensive 30-day money-back guarantee for all new subscriptions. If you are not satisfied with your Nimbus product, you can request a full refund within the first 30 days of your initial purchase. This applies to both monthly and annual plans across our entire software suite. To initiate a refund, please submit a ticket to our billing team through your administrator console.
policies.freeTrial: All Nimbus products come with a 14-day free trial that includes full access to premium features. No credit card is required to start your trial, ensuring a risk-free evaluation period. At the end of the trial, you can seamlessly upgrade to a paid plan without losing any of your setup data.
policies.billing: We offer both monthly and annual billing cycles, with annual plans receiving a 20 percent discount. We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfers for enterprise accounts exceeding $5,000 USD. All transactions are processed in USD, though local currency display options are available in the billing dashboard.
policies.cancellation: Administrators can cancel their subscription or downgrade their plan at any time directly from the billing portal. Upon cancellation, your account will remain active until the end of your current billing cycle. We retain your data for 60 days post-cancellation to allow for easy reactivation or data export before permanent deletion.
policies.sla: We guarantee a 99.9 percent monthly uptime for all standard plans and 99.99 percent for enterprise tiers. If we fail to meet this SLA, affected customers are eligible for service credits applied to their next billing cycle. Credits range from 10 percent to 50 percent of the monthly fee depending on the severity of the outage.
policies.security: Nimbus is fully compliant with SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and global privacy frameworks including GDPR and CCPA. All customer data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption standards. We also conduct regular third-party penetration testing to ensure our infrastructure remains secure against emerging threats.
policies.dataResidency: Customers can choose to host their data in our secure regional data centers located in the US, EU, IN, or AU. Data residency selections are made during account creation and ensure compliance with local data localization regulations.
policies.support: Standard plans include email and live chat support during regular business hours. Enterprise customers receive priority phone support and a dedicated technical account manager. All users have unlimited access to the Nimbus Knowledge base and community forums.

products.name: Nimbus CRM
products.tagline: Build relationships and close deals faster.
products.summary: Nimbus CRM is the foundational hub for your sales team, offering comprehensive contact management and sales pipeline visibility. Track every interaction and forecast revenue with precision.
products.description:
Nimbus CRM centralizes your customer data so your sales team can focus on building relationships instead of hunting for information. It provides a unified view of every prospect and customer, tracking emails, calls, and meetings in a single timeline. Your team can easily manage multiple sales pipelines, customize deal stages, and automate routine tasks to keep opportunities moving forward.

With powerful forecasting tools and visual dashboards, sales leaders gain instant insights into team performance and future revenue. The platform scales effortlessly as your business grows, ensuring that everyone from frontline reps to executives has the exact data they need to drive sustainable growth.

addOns.name: Extra Storage
addOns.desc: Add additional file storage for customer documents and attachments.

faqs.a: Nimbus CRM starts with a Free tier for small teams, while paid plans range from $15 per user monthly for Starter to $45 per user monthly for Professional. Enterprise pricing is custom.
Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all paid plans with no credit card required.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus CRM?
faqs.a: We provide a 30-day money-back guarantee for all new subscriptions if you are not completely satisfied.

faqs.q: Can I import my existing contacts?
faqs.a: Absolutely, you can easily import contacts from CSV files or directly from other popular CRM platforms using our migration wizard.

products.name: Nimbus Leads
products.tagline: Automate outreach and engage your best prospects.
products.summary: Nimbus Leads empowers your sales development reps with automated outreach sequences, a built-in dialer, and intelligent lead scoring. Connect with the right prospects at the perfect time.
products.description:
Nimbus Leads transforms how your team handles outbound sales by automating repetitive outreach tasks. You can create multi-channel sequences that combine emails, phone calls, and social touches into a seamless workflow. The built-in power dialer allows reps to call through lists rapidly while automatically logging call notes and outcomes directly into your database.

To ensure your team focuses on the highest value targets, the platform includes predictive lead scoring based on engagement metrics and demographic data. Real-time analytics help managers coach their teams effectively, optimize messaging, and maximize connection rates across all communication channels.

addOns.name: Additional Call Minutes
addOns.desc: Purchase extra VoIP calling minutes for high-volume outbound teams.

faqs.a: Nimbus Leads has a Free tier, a Starter plan at $25 per user monthly, a Professional plan at $65 per user monthly, and custom Enterprise pricing.
Yes, you can try Nimbus Leads free for 14 days with full access to Professional features.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Leads?
faqs.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all initial subscriptions.

faqs.q: Does the dialer support international calling?
faqs.a: Yes, our built-in dialer supports calling to over 100 countries, with rates varying by destination region.

products.name: Nimbus Quote
products.tagline: Create proposals and close deals with ease.
products.summary: Nimbus Quote is a complete CPQ and proposal solution that accelerates your sales cycle. Generate accurate quotes, collaborate in deal rooms, and capture secure e-signatures.
products.description:
Nimbus Quote streamlines the final stages of your sales process by eliminating manual errors and slow approval cycles. Sales reps can quickly configure complex products, apply approved discounts, and generate beautiful, branded proposals in minutes. The platform ensures pricing accuracy while giving leadership full control over discount workflows and margin requirements.

Beyond basic quoting, the software provides interactive deal rooms where buyers and sellers can collaborate, review documents, and negotiate terms in real time. Once an agreement is reached, legally binding e-signatures allow customers to sign off instantly from any device, drastically reducing the time it takes to close business.

addOns.name: Premium E-Signatures
addOns.desc: Advanced identity verification and compliance tracking for highly regulated industries.

faqs.a: Nimbus Quote offers a Free tier, Starter at $20 per user monthly, Professional at $50 per user monthly, and custom pricing for Enterprise.
Yes, you can start a 14-day free trial to test out deal rooms and e-signatures.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Quote?
faqs.a: All new accounts are covered by our 30-day money-back guarantee.
Yes, our e-signatures comply with major international laws including ESIGN, UETA, and eIDAS.

products.name: Nimbus Campaigns
products.tagline: Automate emails and drive customer journeys effortlessly.
products.summary: Nimbus Campaigns is a powerful email marketing and automation platform designed to help you engage leads and close deals. Build personalized journeys that deliver the right message at exactly the right time.
products.description:
Nimbus Campaigns empowers marketing teams to create beautiful, responsive emails without writing a single line of code. Our intuitive drag-and-drop editor and extensive template library make it easy to craft professional campaigns in minutes. You can segment your audience based on behavior, demographics, and engagement metrics to ensure maximum relevance for every message sent.
Beyond simple broadcasts, the platform offers advanced marketing automation capabilities. You can build complex, multi-step customer journeys using a visual workflow builder. Set up triggers based on email opens, link clicks, or actions taken on your website to automatically nurture prospects down the funnel. With built-in A/B testing and comprehensive analytics, you can continuously optimize your strategy for better conversion rates.
keyFeatures: Drag-and-drop email builder with responsive templates
Visual automation journey builder with conditional logic
Advanced list segmentation and dynamic content
A/B testing for subject lines and email content
Spam testing and deliverability optimization tools
Behavioral triggers based on user actions

addOns.name: Dedicated IP
addOns.desc: Improve your sender reputation with a dedicated IP address for your campaigns.

faqs.a: We offer a Free tier for basic needs, a Starter plan at $15 per user per month, a Professional plan at $45 per user per month, and custom Enterprise pricing.
Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on our Starter and Professional plans with no credit card required.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Campaigns?
faqs.a: We stand by our product with a 30-day money-back guarantee for all new paid subscriptions.

faqs.q: Can I import my existing contact lists?
faqs.a: Absolutely, you can easily import contacts via CSV or sync them directly from Nimbus CRM and other supported integrations.

products.name: Nimbus Social
products.tagline: Manage, monitor, and measure your social presence.
products.summary: Nimbus Social is an all-in-one social media management tool that lets you schedule posts, listen to brand conversations, and analyze performance across networks. Streamline your social strategy from a single intuitive dashboard.
products.description:
Nimbus Social simplifies the way businesses handle their social media presence across multiple platforms. With our unified content calendar, your team can draft, review, and schedule posts weeks in advance. Collaborative approval workflows ensure that every piece of content meets your brand guidelines before it goes live, saving time and preventing costly mistakes.
The platform also features powerful social listening and analytics tools. Track brand mentions, monitor industry keywords, and gauge customer sentiment in real time. Our comprehensive reporting dashboards break down follower growth, engagement rates, and click-through metrics, helping you understand exactly what content resonates with your audience and how to improve your overall social strategy.
keyFeatures: Bulk scheduling and automated queue management
Multi-network support including LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook
Social listening and brand mention monitoring
Unified social inbox for responding to messages

addOns.name: Extra Social Profiles
addOns.desc: Add more social media accounts to your workspace as your brand grows.

faqs.a: Nimbus Social includes a Free tier, a Starter plan for $20 per user per month, a Professional plan for $50 per user per month, and custom Enterprise packages.
Yes, you can try the Professional tier features free for 14 days without entering a credit card.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Social?
faqs.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you are not completely satisfied with your subscription.

faqs.q: Which social networks do you support?
faqs.a: We currently support scheduling and monitoring for Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Pinterest, TikTok, and YouTube.

products.name: Nimbus Sites
products.tagline: Build high-converting landing pages and websites instantly.
products.summary: Nimbus Sites is a visual website and landing page builder designed to help marketers capture more leads. Create beautiful, mobile-optimized pages with integrated forms and native A/B testing.
products.description:
Nimbus Sites gives marketing professionals the power to launch stunning web pages without needing a developer. The platform features a robust drag-and-drop interface and a vast library of conversion-optimized templates tailored for various industries. Whether you are launching a product, hosting a webinar, or capturing newsletter signups, you can design and publish your page in record time.
To help you maximize your marketing ROI, Nimbus Sites includes powerful conversion rate optimization tools. You can easily set up A/B tests to compare different headlines, images, or calls to action to see what drives the most conversions. Built-in lead capture forms automatically sync with your CRM and marketing tools, ensuring that no prospect falls through the cracks.
keyFeatures: Dynamic text replacement for personalized experiences
Built-in lead capture forms and pop-ups
Custom domain mapping and SSL certificates
Global blocks for headers and footers

addOns.name: Additional Visitor Capacity
addOns.desc: Scale your bandwidth seamlessly during high-traffic marketing campaigns.

faqs.a: Pricing starts with a Free tier, moves to $25 per user per month for Starter, $60 for Professional, and custom pricing for Enterprise.
Yes, we provide a 14-day free trial on all premium plans so you can test the builder before buying.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Sites?
faqs.a: All paid plans are backed by our standard 30-day money-back guarantee.

faqs.q: Can I use my own custom domain?
faqs.a: Yes, custom domain mapping with free SSL certificates is included on all paid plans.

products.name: Nimbus Books
products.tagline: Smart double entry accounting for growing businesses
products.summary: Nimbus Books simplifies your financial management with automated workflows and real-time insights. Stay compliant and ready for tax season with our intuitive double-entry accounting software.
products.description:
Nimbus Books provides a comprehensive suite of accounting tools designed to give you complete visibility into your business finances. From managing charts of accounts to reconciling bank statements, our platform automates the tedious aspects of bookkeeping so you can focus on growth. Powerful reporting features ensure you always know your cash flow status.

Built for modern teams, Nimbus Books allows seamless collaboration between business owners and their accountants. Role-based access controls keep your financial data secure while providing the right level of visibility to stakeholders. With automated tax calculations and multi-currency support, scaling your operations globally has never been easier.

addOns.name: Dedicated Bookkeeper
addOns.desc: Monthly reconciliation and review by a certified Nimbus partner.

faqs.a: Nimbus Books starts with a Free tier for basic needs, while our Starter plan is $15 per user per month. Professional is $40 per user per month, and Enterprise pricing is customized to your needs.
Yes, all paid plans come with a 14-day free trial so you can explore the advanced features before committing.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Books?
faqs.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied within your first 30 days of a paid subscription, we will issue a full refund.

faqs.q: Can I invite my external accountant to Nimbus Books?
faqs.a: Yes, all paid plans include a dedicated accountant role that allows your CPA to access your books without consuming a paid user seat.

products.name: Nimbus Invoice
products.tagline: Effortless invoicing and fast online payment collection
products.summary: Create professional invoices, set up recurring billing, and accept online payments in minutes. Nimbus Invoice helps you get paid faster and improves your cash flow.
products.description:
Nimbus Invoice takes the friction out of billing your clients. You can easily design custom invoices that reflect your brand, send them via email or SMS, and track when they are opened. By integrating directly with major payment gateways, your clients can pay you instantly using credit cards, bank transfers, or digital wallets.

Managing recurring revenue is simple with our automated subscription billing engine. You can set up flexible billing schedules, handle proration, and send automated payment reminders for overdue accounts. The centralized dashboard gives you a clear view of outstanding balances and revenue trends, ensuring nothing slips through the cracks.

addOns.name: Advanced Custom Domain
addOns.desc: Host your client payment portal on your own custom web address.

faqs.a: We offer a Free tier for up to 10 invoices a month. The Starter plan is $10 per user per month, Professional is $30 per user per month, and Enterprise is custom priced.
Yes, you can try any premium plan free for 14 days with no credit card required.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Invoice?
faqs.a: We stand by our 30-day money-back guarantee. If you cancel within the first 30 days of your paid subscription, we will refund your payment in full.

faqs.q: Does Nimbus Invoice charge transaction fees?
faqs.a: Nimbus does not charge any additional transaction fees, but standard processing rates from your connected payment gateway will still apply.

products.name: Nimbus Expense
products.tagline: Streamline corporate spending and employee reimbursement workflows
products.summary: Control company spending with smart corporate cards and automated expense reporting. Nimbus Expense eliminates manual data entry and accelerates employee reimbursements.
products.description:
Nimbus Expense transforms how your company handles employee spending and out-of-pocket reimbursements. Employees can simply snap a picture of their receipts using our mobile app, and our optical character recognition technology instantly extracts the details to create an expense line item. Managers can approve reports on the go, speeding up the entire reimbursement cycle.

Take control of your budget by issuing physical and virtual Nimbus corporate cards with built-in spending limits. You can set custom policies to automatically flag out-of-policy expenses and route high-value requests to senior management. Real-time spend analytics give finance teams the visibility they need to optimize cash flow and enforce compliance across the organization.

addOns.name: Global Reimbursements
addOns.desc: Reimburse employees in over 130 local currencies without exorbitant FX fees.

faqs.a: Nimbus Expense is free for basic receipt tracking. Starter is $15 per user per month, Professional is $35 per user per month, and Enterprise is custom priced based on your organization size.
Absolutely, you can test drive the Starter or Professional plans free for 14 days.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Expense?
faqs.a: All our paid plans are backed by a 30-day money-back guarantee. If it is not a fit, cancel within 30 days for a complete refund.

faqs.q: Are the corporate cards credit or prepaid cards?
faqs.a: Nimbus corporate cards are charge cards that draw directly from your connected business bank account, meaning no interest charges or credit checks are required.

products.name: Nimbus People
products.tagline: Centralize your workforce and streamline employee management.
products.summary: Nimbus People is a comprehensive HRIS that manages your entire employee lifecycle from onboarding to offboarding. Keep your organization aligned with centralized records, time off tracking, and interactive org charts.
products.description:
Managing employee data shouldn't be a hassle. Nimbus People gives your HR team a single source of truth for employee records, performance evaluations, and document management. Your staff can easily request time off, view company holidays, and update their personal information through an intuitive self-service portal.

Beyond basic records, Nimbus People helps you build a strong company culture. Automated onboarding workflows ensure new hires feel welcome and prepared from day one. Interactive org charts and employee directories make it simple for teams to connect and collaborate across different departments and locations.

addOns.name: Advanced Analytics
addOns.desc: Gain deeper insights into employee retention, diversity metrics, and compensation trends.

faqs.a: Nimbus People offers a Free tier for small teams, a Starter plan at $10 per user per month, and a Professional plan at $30 per user per month. Enterprise pricing is custom and available upon request.
Yes, all paid plans come with a 14-day free trial so you can explore the premium features before committing.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus People?
faqs.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied within the first 30 days of your paid subscription, you can request a full refund.

faqs.q: Can employees update their own information?
faqs.a: Yes, Nimbus People includes a self-service portal where employees can safely update personal details, request time off, and access tax documents.

products.name: Nimbus Recruit
products.tagline: Attract, evaluate, and hire top talent faster.
products.summary: Nimbus Recruit is a modern applicant tracking system designed to streamline your hiring process. Create custom hiring pipelines, schedule interviews, and collaborate with your team to find the perfect candidates.
products.description:
Finding the right talent requires a structured and efficient hiring process. Nimbus Recruit provides a central hub where recruiters and hiring managers can track applicants across multiple job postings. You can easily build custom hiring pipelines, automate email communications, and parse resumes with intelligent data extraction to save time on manual entry.

Collaboration is at the heart of great hiring decisions. With built-in interview kits, scorecards, and feedback loops, your hiring team can evaluate candidates objectively and consistently. Seamless integrations with major job boards ensure your postings reach a wide audience, while detailed analytics help you identify bottlenecks in your recruitment funnel.

addOns.name: AI Sourcing Assistant
addOns.desc: Automatically discover and engage passive candidates matching your job descriptions.

faqs.a: We offer a Free tier for basic needs, a Starter plan at $25 per user per month, and a Professional plan at $60 per user per month. Enterprise plans are custom priced based on your organization.
Yes, you can try the Starter or Professional plans free for 14 days, no credit card required.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Recruit?
faqs.a: All paid plans are backed by our 30-day money-back guarantee. If you cancel within the first 30 days, we will issue a full refund.

faqs.q: Can I post to multiple job boards at once?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Nimbus Recruit allows you to syndicate your job postings to over 50 major job boards with a single click.

products.name: Nimbus Payroll
products.tagline: Accurate, automated payroll and tax filing simplified.
products.summary: Nimbus Payroll takes the complexity out of paying your team by automating payroll runs, tax calculations, and compliance. Easily pay full-time employees and independent contractors in a few clicks.
products.description:
Processing payroll is critical, and accuracy is non-negotiable. Nimbus Payroll automates the entire payroll lifecycle, calculating wages, deductions, and taxes with precision. You can set payroll to run automatically on your preferred schedule, ensuring your team gets paid on time, every time, via direct deposit or printed checks.

Staying compliant with local and federal tax regulations is effortless. The platform automatically files your payroll taxes and generates necessary year-end forms like W-2s and 1099s. With support for both salaried employees and hourly contractors, Nimbus Payroll adapts to the unique structure of your modern workforce.

addOns.name: International Contractor Payments
addOns.desc: Pay international contractors in their local currency across 120 countries.

faqs.a: Nimbus Payroll starts with a Free tier for a few contractors, a Starter plan at $20 per user per month, and a Professional plan at $50 per user per month. Enterprise pricing is custom.
Yes, you can run simulated payrolls in our 14-day free trial before connecting your actual bank accounts.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Payroll?
faqs.a: We provide a 30-day money-back guarantee on all subscription fees. If you are unhappy within the first 30 days, we will refund your software fees.

faqs.q: Does Nimbus Payroll handle tax filings automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, on Starter and higher plans, we automatically calculate, withhold, and file your local, state, and federal payroll taxes.

products.name: Nimbus Desk
products.tagline: Omnichannel helpdesk with powerful SLA management.
products.summary: Nimbus Desk brings all your customer conversations into a unified inbox with robust ticketing and automation.
products.description:
Nimbus Desk allows your support team to manage customer inquiries from email, social media, phone, and web forms in a single interface. By eliminating the need to switch between different applications, agents can resolve issues faster and maintain a consistent customer experience across all channels.

Advanced automation rules let you route tickets to the right agents based on skill, workload, or customer tier. You can easily configure complex service level agreements to ensure timely responses, while detailed reporting dashboards give managers full visibility into team performance and bottlenecks.
keyFeatures: Collision detection to prevent duplicate replies
Time tracking and agent activity logs

addOns.name: Additional Storage
addOns.desc: Expand your file attachment storage capacity.

faqs.a: Nimbus Desk offers a Free tier for up to 3 users. Paid plans start at $20 per user per month on the Starter tier, and $50 per user per month on the Professional tier. Enterprise pricing is custom.
Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial of the Professional plan so you can test all the advanced features before committing.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Desk?
faqs.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied within your first 30 days of a paid subscription, you can request a full refund.
Yes, Nimbus Desk allows agents to easily merge duplicate tickets from the same customer to keep the conversation history clean and organized.

products.name: Nimbus Chat
products.tagline: Live chat and AI bots for instant support.
products.summary: Nimbus Chat helps you engage website visitors in real time with proactive messaging and intelligent chatbots.
products.description:
Nimbus Chat connects you with your customers exactly when they need help. By embedding our lightweight, customizable widget on your website or mobile app, your team can offer instant assistance, answer product questions, and guide users through the checkout process. Proactive triggers allow you to initiate conversations based on user behavior, reducing bounce rates and increasing conversion.

The integrated AI chatbot can handle common questions automatically, freeing up your human agents to focus on complex technical issues. When a human touch is required, the bot seamlessly transfers the conversation to an available agent along with the full chat history and user context, ensuring a frictionless support experience.

addOns.name: Extra Bot Sessions
addOns.desc: Add more automated AI chatbot sessions to your monthly limit.

faqs.a: The Free tier is available at no cost. Paid tiers include Starter at $15 per user per month, and Professional at $45 per user per month. Enterprise plans require custom pricing.
Yes, you can try the Professional plan features free for 14 days without entering a credit card.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Chat?
faqs.a: All paid plans come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you cancel within the first 30 days, you will receive a full refund.

faqs.q: Can I customize the look of the chat widget?
faqs.a: Absolutely. You can change the colors, logos, launcher icons, and welcome messages to perfectly match your brand identity.

products.name: Nimbus Knowledge
products.tagline: Empower customers with self service help centers.
products.summary: Nimbus Knowledge lets you build beautiful, searchable help centers so customers can find answers on their own.
products.description:
Nimbus Knowledge provides an intuitive authoring environment for creating, organizing, and publishing support articles, tutorials, and FAQs. By building a comprehensive self service portal, you can significantly reduce the volume of incoming support tickets and provide your customers with 24/7 access to the information they need. The platform supports rich media, allowing you to embed videos, images, and code snippets directly into your documentation.

Beyond content creation, Nimbus Knowledge offers powerful analytics to help you understand what your customers are searching for. You can track article views, analyze failed search queries, and collect feedback ratings to continuously improve your content. The fully customizable portal can be hosted on your own custom domain and styled to match your corporate website seamlessly.

addOns.name: Automated Translation
addOns.desc: Automatically translate your articles into up to 10 languages using AI.

faqs.a: Nimbus Knowledge is Free for up to 3 users. The Starter plan is $15 per user per month, and the Professional plan is $35 per user per month. Enterprise pricing is tailored to your needs.
Yes, a 14-day free trial is available for the Professional tier to let you explore custom domains and advanced analytics.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Knowledge?
faqs.a: We stand by our product with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are unhappy during your first month of a paid plan, we will refund your payment.

faqs.q: Can I host the help center on my own domain?
faqs.a: Yes, starting from the Starter plan, you can map your knowledge base to a custom domain or subdomain of your choosing.

products.name: Nimbus Projects
products.tagline: Deliver projects on time with intelligent task management.
products.summary: Nimbus Projects is a comprehensive project management solution designed to help teams plan, track, and execute work efficiently. It combines intuitive task tracking with powerful resource management and timeline views.
products.description:
Keep your team aligned and your deliverables on track with Nimbus Projects. By providing a centralized workspace for all your tasks, milestones, and deadlines, this tool eliminates confusion and ensures everyone knows exactly what they need to do and when. Advanced resource allocation features help managers balance workloads across the team to prevent burnout and maximize productivity.

Whether you are running a small marketing campaign or a massive software deployment, Nimbus Projects adapts to your workflow. Integrated time tracking, customizable reporting, and automated status updates give stakeholders complete visibility into project health. Seamless connections with other Nimbus products mean your project data flows effortlessly to your billing and support teams.

addOns.name: Premium Client Portals
addOns.desc: White-labeled project portals for your external clients.

faqs.a: We offer a Free tier for small teams, a Starter plan at $10 per user per month, a Professional plan at $30 per user per month, and custom Enterprise pricing.
Yes, all paid plans come with a 14-day free trial so you can explore the advanced features before committing.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Projects?
faqs.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied within your first month, we will refund your payment in full.

faqs.q: Can I track billable hours directly in the app?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Nimbus Projects includes native time tracking that syncs directly with Nimbus Invoice for seamless client billing.

products.name: Nimbus Docs
products.tagline: Collaborate on beautiful documents in real time.
products.summary: Nimbus Docs is a modern workspace for team knowledge, offering real-time collaborative editing and rich media support. It serves as your single source of truth for company wikis, meeting notes, and project documentation.
products.description:
Empower your team to write, edit, and share ideas instantly with Nimbus Docs. Multiple users can work on the same document simultaneously without locking issues or version conflicts. The intuitive editor supports rich text, inline code blocks, tables, and embedded media, making it easy to build comprehensive knowledge bases or draft quick meeting minutes.

Organization is effortless with nested folders, tag-based search, and customizable workspaces for different departments. Granular permission controls ensure that sensitive information remains secure while still being accessible to the right people. By integrating directly with your communication and project tools, Nimbus Docs keeps your company knowledge accessible exactly where your team already works.

addOns.name: Nimbus Docs AI
addOns.desc: Generative AI writing assistant to summarize notes and draft content.

faqs.a: Nimbus Docs is free for basic use, $8 per user per month for Starter, $15 per user per month for Professional, and custom for Enterprise.
Yes, you can try the Professional plan free for 14 days.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Docs?
faqs.a: We provide a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid subscriptions if it does not meet your expectations.

faqs.q: Can I import my existing documents from other platforms?
faqs.a: Yes, you can import standard formats like Word, Markdown, and text files directly into your workspaces.

products.name: Nimbus Boards
products.tagline: Visualize workflows with intuitive kanban and online whiteboards.
products.summary: Nimbus Boards provides flexible visual workspaces for brainstorming, sprint planning, and agile workflow management. Teams can seamlessly switch between structured kanban boards and freeform digital whiteboards.
products.description:
Bring your ideas to life and streamline your agile processes with Nimbus Boards. Whether your team is mapping out a new user journey on a limitless whiteboard or moving task cards through a structured kanban pipeline, this tool adapts to your creative and operational needs. Sticky notes, drawing tools, and flowchart shapes make remote brainstorming sessions feel just as interactive as being in the same room.

Beyond simple ideation, Nimbus Boards is built for action. You can easily convert whiteboard sticky notes into trackable kanban cards with assignees, due dates, and custom tags. Automated triggers help move cards between columns based on status updates, saving your team from manual data entry. It is the perfect bridge between unstructured creativity and organized execution.
keyFeatures: Board export to image or PDF

addOns.name: Agile Coaching Templates
addOns.desc: A premium library of agile frameworks and retrospective templates.

faqs.a: Pricing ranges from a Free tier to $12 per user per month for Starter, $25 for Professional, and custom Enterprise pricing.
Yes, sign up for a 14-day free trial of the Professional plan to test all premium features.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Boards?
faqs.a: All paid plans are backed by a 30-day money-back guarantee.

faqs.q: Can I link kanban cards to Nimbus Projects tasks?
faqs.a: Yes, Nimbus Boards integrates natively with Nimbus Projects, allowing you to sync cards and tasks bidirectionally.

products.name: Nimbus Analytics
products.tagline: Self-serve business intelligence and reporting made easy.
products.summary: Nimbus Analytics empowers your team to explore data, build custom reports, and uncover actionable insights without writing code.
products.description:
Nimbus Analytics transforms raw data into meaningful business intelligence. Users can drag and drop fields to create comprehensive reports, visualize trends, and share findings across the organization seamlessly.

With native connections to the entire Nimbus suite and external data sources, you can blend sales, marketing, and finance data into a single source of truth. Automated scheduled reports ensure stakeholders always have the latest metrics in their inbox.
keyFeatures: Export to PDF, CSV, and Excel

addOns.name: Premium AI Insights
addOns.desc: Advanced machine learning forecasting and anomaly detection capabilities.

faqs.a: We offer a Free tier for basic needs, a Starter plan at $15 per user per month, a Professional plan at $45 per user per month, and custom Enterprise pricing.
Yes, all paid plans come with a 14-day free trial so you can test our advanced features.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Analytics?
faqs.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you are not completely satisfied with your purchase.

faqs.q: Can I embed reports in my own application?
faqs.a: Yes, embedded analytics is available on the Professional and Enterprise plans.

products.name: Nimbus Dashboards
products.tagline: Real-time operational dashboards and alerts for teams.
products.summary: Monitor your vital business metrics in real time with interactive dashboards and instant alerts for critical changes.
products.description:
Nimbus Dashboards provides a live view of your operations by connecting directly to your most important data streams. Create beautiful, TV-ready displays that keep your entire team aligned on daily goals and performance indicators.

Set up custom threshold alerts to notify your team via email or chat the moment a metric drops below or spikes above your target. Stay proactive and resolve operational bottlenecks before they impact your business.

addOns.name: Extra Alert Credits
addOns.desc: Add 500 additional SMS or webhook alerts to your monthly quota.

faqs.a: Pricing starts with a Free tier, followed by Starter at $10 per user per month, Professional at $30 per user per month, and custom Enterprise plans.
Yes, you can try the Professional plan features free for 14 days.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Dashboards?
faqs.a: We provide a complete 30-day money-back guarantee on all initial paid subscriptions.

faqs.q: Can I display these dashboards on office TVs?
faqs.a: Absolutely, our dedicated TV mode optimizes the layout for large screens and automatically cycles through multiple dashboard tabs.

products.name: Nimbus DataPipe
products.tagline: No-code ETL and data integration made simple.
products.summary: Seamlessly move data between your favorite apps and data warehouses without writing a single line of code.
products.description:
Nimbus DataPipe takes the complexity out of ETL by providing intuitive visual pipelines for data extraction, transformation, and loading. Connect your operational apps to your central data warehouse in minutes to ensure your analytics tools always have fresh data.

Built-in transformation nodes allow you to clean, filter, and map fields on the fly. With robust error handling and automated retry logic, you can trust that your data will arrive accurately and securely every time.

addOns.name: Additional Sync Volume
addOns.desc: Add 1,000,000 extra records to your monthly sync limit.

faqs.a: We offer a Free tier, a Starter plan at $25 per user per month, a Professional plan at $65 per user per month, and Enterprise pricing upon request.
Yes, new users can explore all Professional features with a 14-day free trial.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus DataPipe?
faqs.a: All paid plans are backed by our 30-day money-back guarantee for your peace of mind.
We currently support Amazon Redshift, Google BigQuery, Snowflake, and PostgreSQL.

products.name: Nimbus Vault
products.tagline: Secure password and secrets management for teams.
products.summary: Nimbus Vault helps teams store, share, and manage passwords and infrastructure secrets securely. It ensures your sensitive credentials are encrypted and easily accessible only to authorized personnel.
products.description:
Nimbus Vault provides a highly secure, centralized repository for all your company passwords, API keys, and infrastructure secrets. Built with zero-knowledge encryption, it guarantees that only your team can access your sensitive data, protecting your organization from credential theft and unauthorized access.

Beyond basic password management, Nimbus Vault offers advanced role-based access control, automated credential rotation, and comprehensive audit logs. Whether you are a small team sharing web logins or a large enterprise managing database credentials across multiple environments, Vault scales to meet your security needs seamlessly.
keyFeatures: Secure password sharing and shared folders
API key and infrastructure secret storage

addOns.name: Advanced Threat Intelligence
addOns.desc: Proactively scans and alerts on compromised credentials across the dark web.

faqs.a: Nimbus Vault offers a Free tier for up to 3 users, a Starter tier at 10 USD per user per month, a Professional tier at 25 USD per user per month, and custom Enterprise pricing.
Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for the Starter and Professional tiers so you can test all premium features.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Vault?
faqs.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans if you are not completely satisfied.

faqs.q: Can I recover my data if I lose my master password?
faqs.a: Because Nimbus Vault uses zero-knowledge encryption, we cannot recover your master password, but administrators can configure account recovery policies for managed users.

products.name: Nimbus SSO
products.tagline: Seamless identity and access management for business.
products.summary: Nimbus SSO provides secure single sign-on and identity management for your entire workforce. It simplifies access to all your web and mobile applications with one set of credentials.
products.description:
Nimbus SSO streamlines the login experience by connecting your employees to all their essential applications through a single, secure portal. By eliminating the need for multiple passwords, it reduces helpdesk tickets and improves user productivity while enforcing strong authentication policies across your organization.

Security is paramount, which is why Nimbus SSO includes adaptive multi-factor authentication, contextual access policies, and automated user provisioning. IT administrators gain complete visibility and control over who has access to what, ensuring compliance and protecting company data from unauthorized entry.
keyFeatures: Single sign-on (SSO) for web and mobile
Integration with Active Directory and LDAP

addOns.name: Advanced Identity Protection
addOns.desc: Adds machine learning driven risk scoring to prevent unauthorized access attempts.

faqs.a: We have a Free tier for small teams, Starter at 15 USD per user per month, Professional at 35 USD per user per month, and custom Enterprise plans.
Yes, you can evaluate the Professional tier features with a full 14-day free trial.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus SSO?
faqs.a: All paid plans are backed by a 30-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked.

faqs.q: Does Nimbus SSO support custom SAML applications?
faqs.a: Yes, you can easily configure custom SAML 2.0 and OIDC connections for any internal or third-party application.

products.name: Nimbus Endpoint
products.tagline: Comprehensive device management and endpoint security.
products.summary: Nimbus Endpoint allows IT teams to manage, secure, and monitor company-owned and bring-your-own devices from a single cloud console. It protects your endpoints against malware and unauthorized access.
products.description:
Nimbus Endpoint simplifies mobile device management (MDM) and endpoint protection for modern, distributed workforces. IT administrators can easily deploy applications, enforce security policies, and wipe lost devices remotely, ensuring that corporate data remains secure regardless of where employees are working.

In addition to device management, Nimbus Endpoint includes next-generation antivirus and threat detection capabilities. It continuously monitors device health, blocks malicious software, and provides instant alerts for suspicious activities, giving your security team the tools they need to respond to threats in real time.
keyFeatures: Cross-platform device management (Windows, Mac, iOS, Android)
Automated patch management and OS updates
USB device control and encryption enforcement

addOns.name: Managed Threat Response
addOns.desc: Provides 24/7 monitoring and incident response by our team of security experts.

faqs.a: Pricing starts with a Free tier, moves to Starter at 20 USD per user per month, Professional at 45 USD per user per month, and Enterprise for custom needs.
Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on our Starter and Professional plans.

faqs.q: What is the refund policy for Nimbus Endpoint?
faqs.a: We stand by our product with a full 30-day money-back guarantee for all new subscriptions.

faqs.q: Will the endpoint agent slow down employee computers?
faqs.a: No, our agent is designed to be ultra-lightweight and consumes minimal system resources during background scans.
